nasb.text: The sons of Pedaiah were Zerubbabel and Shimei. And the sons of Zerubbabel were Meshullam and Hananiah, and Shelomith was their sister;

esv.text: and the sons of Pedaiah: Zerubbabel and Shimei; and the sons of Zerubbabel: Meshullam and Hananiah, and Shelomith was their sister;

cnv.text: 毘大雅的兒子是所羅巴伯和示每；所羅巴伯的兒子是米書蘭和哈拿尼雅，還有他們的妹妹示羅密。

ccb.text: 毗大雅的儿子是所罗巴伯和示每。所罗巴伯的儿子是米书兰和哈拿尼雅，女儿是示罗密，
